requirement.title: REQ-1965
requirement.requirement: The contractor shall provide the samples with PPA report for sampling to the client (as per ``OEM Special Terms (OEM-ST 13)'' [LH-3010]) by the following deadline: 4 weeks prior to ``100% PPA-capable parts with PPA report (PPPA report) are provided in accordance with ramp-up'' (see: `` Excerpt from Process Master Plan for Suppliers '' [tbd])
